reasoning: Initial observation suggests that absorbance is directly related to molar absorptivity, concentration, and path length. Transmittance is the reciprocal of absorbance, so it can be used as another data point. To confirm the relationship, I will increase the molar absorptivity and observe the changes.
The absorbance increased proportionally with the increase in molar absorptivity. This supports the Beer-Lambert law. Next, I will increase the concentration to further validate the relationship.
The absorbance increased proportionally with both the increase in molar absorptivity and concentration, supporting the Beer-Lambert law. No further action is needed to deduce the equation.
